file_summary: This is a GitHub issue template file for reporting bugs in the ItsDangerous project. It provides a structured format for users to submit bug reports with sections for describing the bug, providing reproduction steps, expected behavior, and environment details.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire bug report template. Lines 1-3 define the template metadata (name and about). Lines 5-10 provide instructions about using the issue tracker appropriately. Lines 12-16 contain a placeholder for describing the bug. Lines 18-22 contain a placeholder for reproduction steps. Lines 24-27 contain a placeholder for expected behavior and environment details (Python and ItsDangerous versions).
